title: Design principles of electroluminescent devices based on different electrodes and recent advances toward their application in textiles
abstract: Alternating current electroluminescent (ACEL) devices have become an important direction for the development of visualized smart wearable e-textiles due to their advantages of light weight, flexibility, easy integration, and convenient processing.

title: The effect of templating on the mechanical properties of smectic liquid crystal elastomers
abstract: In this work, the effect of phase templating on the mechanical properties of smectic liquid crystal elastomers is examined. Samples polymerised in the nematic phase show markedly different properties to those polymerised in the smectic phase.

title: Self-powered, temperature-sensitive, solar-blind photodetector based on a Pt–ZnGa 2 O 4 –Al Schottky junction induced by coupling of photovoltaic and interfacial pyroelectric effects
abstract: We present a strategy of coupling the photovoltaic and pyroelectric effect for a ZnGa 2 O 4 -based planar Schottky photodiode, which proves to be an effective method to realise higher responsivity and faster response time.

title: A high performance TiO 2 @Ti 3 C 2 T x MXene water vapor sensing material for diagnosing early SGTR accidents in nuclear power plants
abstract: The steam generator (SG) as a key piece of equipment in nuclear power plant servers for both primary and secondary systems. SG tube rupture (SGTR) events occasionally occur during pressurized water reactor operation and cannot be completely avoided.

title: Two-mode upconversion color-tuning of Er:NaYbF 4 nanocrystals and their high-efficiency photothermal conversion
abstract: Er:NaYbF 4 @NaLuF 4 alloyed nanocrystals (24 nm) were synthesized, which achieved dual-mode color-tuning and showed 34% photothermal conversion efficiency. It shows great potential in the fields of anti-counterfeiting and non-invasive cancer treatment.

title: Reactive spark plasma sintering of YAG–YAG:Ce composite phosphor ceramics for laser-driven lighting with high luminous efficacy
abstract: A novel approach utilizing reactive spark plasma sintering of mesoporous Y 2 O 3 and Al 2 O 3 powders and YAG:Ce phosphors is developed. Attributing to the enhanced driving forces, YAG-YAG:Ce CPCs were prepared at reduced sintering temperature.

title: Single crystal Cr 3+ -doped NIR phosphor: enhanced luminescence intensity and improved thermal stability
abstract: Large-sized Cr 3+ -doped single crystal phosphors with enhanced near-infrared luminescence intensity and improved thermal stability relative to polycrystalline powders are successfully prepared via a room-temperature solvent exchange method.

title: Simultaneous enhancement of piezoelectricity and Curie temperature in KNN-based ceramics via a multiple formula solid solution
abstract: Novel approach involving multiple formula solid-solution techniques is presented, whereby the longstanding conflict between d 33 and T C in KNN-based ceramics can be effectively overcome, thus achieving a remarkable d 33 of 550 pC N −1 and T C of 260 °C.

title: Insight into the cation distribution in Co 2 Co 1− x Fe x (BO 3 )O 2 (0.0 < x < 1.0): X-ray diffraction, Mössbauer spectroscopy, and DFT investigations
abstract: A combined approach, including both experimental methods (XRD and Mössbauer spectroscopy) and theoretical calculations (DFT), was applied to establish the cationic distribution in solid solutions Co 2 Co 1− x Fe x (BO 3 )O 2 (0.0 ≤ x ≤ 1.0).

title: Deciphering the crystal structure evolution from 3D non-van der Waals solids to 2D nanosheets
abstract: Shear-assisted fracturing of bulk cyclo-S 8 yields 2D α- and β-sulfur nanosheets, unlocking distinct 2D allotropes.

title: Photo-modulated charge transport in single-molecule optoelectronic devices
abstract: This Feature Article reviews characterization technology, charge transport mechanisms, and applications of single-molecule optoelectronics, while addressing current challenges and future prospects.

title: Ultralong near-infrared persistent luminescence in a Cr 3+ -doped gallogermanate for multifunctional applications
abstract: Mg 8.9 Ga 14.2 Ge 4.9 O 40 :Cr 3+ phosphors exhibit ultralong broadband near-infrared persistent luminescence with a duration longer than 55 h for multifunctional applications.

title: Artificial optoelectronic synapses based on organic–inorganic hybrid perovskite ferroelectrics for reservoir computing
abstract: A neuromorphic visual system with R -LIPF perovskite ferroelectrics enables tunable synaptic plasticity and digital image recognition via reservoir computing.

title: Enhanced photoresponse in 2D seamless metal–semiconductor contact photodiodes via one-step sulfurization synthesis
abstract: This study highlights the advantages of 2D seamless metal–semiconductor junctions in stacked photodiodes, exhibiting remarkable optoelectronic performance.

title: High photodetector responsivity and weak light detection in a manganese doped lead-free low dimensional perovskite
abstract: Photodetector fabricated from bismuth-based perovskite showed high photodetector responsivity along with weak light detection.

title: A heterojunction of high-entropy alloy and nitrogen-doped carbon nanospheres for efficient electromagnetic wave absorption
abstract: A heterojunction of high-entropy alloy and nitrogen-doped carbon nanospheres (HEA/NC) with multiple loss mechanisms was fabricated. By regulating the NC content, HEA/NC exhibited efficient electromagnetic wave absorption performance.

title: Ac-conductivity and structural, magnetic, dielectric, and photocatalytic properties of Gd doped BiFeO 3 nanoparticles
abstract: Gd 3+ doping in BiFeO 3 induces structural transitions and enhances magnetic, dielectric, and photocatalytic properties. Nanoparticles were synthesized via a glycine-assisted combustion method.

title: Dual spectral and temporal encoding in luminescent polymeric films using a Eu III complex and a persistent phosphor for anti-counterfeiting applications
abstract: Luminescent polymeric films containing a Eu III complex and a Eu II persistent phosphor exhibiting dual-mode spectral and temporal encoding for advanced anti-counterfeiting applications.

title: Percolation networks in stretchable electrodes: progress and perspectives
abstract: This review highlights recent advances in percolation network strategies for stretchable electrodes, covering material design, structural engineering, interfacial optimization approaches, and applications in soft electronics.

title: LEGO®-inspired assembly strategy for fabricating BN-CNT-BN multilayer Kevlar-based composites as high-performance temperature sensors and fire alarms
abstract: LEGO®-inspired fabrication methods for high performance temperature sensors and fire alarm.

title: Polyvinylpyrrolidone-enhanced perovskite films for efficient direct X-ray detection
abstract: Incorporating polyvinylpyrrolidone into the MAPbI 3 perovskite film fabricated via the blade coating technique effectively promotes crystal growth, reduces internal defects, and thus enhances the X-ray detection response while lowering dark current.

title: Enargite (Cu 3 AsS 4 ): a ductile mid-temperature thermoelectric material
abstract: A thermally, mechanically and dynamically stable enargite (Cu 3 AsS 4 ) mineral exhibits an exceptional zT of 2.31 at 900 K, offering strong potential for mid-temperature thermoelectric applications.

title: Investigation of the design and performance regulation of (1 − x )Bi 0.5 Na 0.5 TiO 3 – x Bi 0.2 Na 0.2 Ba 0.2 Sr 0.2 Ca 0.2 TiO 3 piezoelectric systems via a high-entropy strategy
abstract: The application of high-entropy strategy successfully realizes quantitative regulation of relaxor state in BNT. The piezoelectric performance can be regularly modified accompanied by a significant improvement in electromechanical coupling behavior.

title: Structural design and controlled fabrication of advanced airflow sensors
abstract: Airflow sensors are in huge demand in many fields such as the aerospace industry, weather forecasting, environmental monitoring, chemical and biological engineering, health monitoring, wearable smart devices, etc .

title: Europium ions modulated room temperature phosphorescence in dye-encapsulated MOFs for dual-modal fluorescence-afterglow
abstract: Lu-MOFs with formic acid as the sole ligand were synthesized by a formamide hydrolysis reaction. The luminescence color and intensity of Lu–Eu-MOFs-bipy can be controlled by the energy competition and transfer between 4,4′-bipyridine and Eu 3+ .

title: π-Functionalized 1,5-diazocines with diverse intramolecular connectivities to modulate photophysical and electroluminescence properties
abstract: π-Functionalized 1,5-diazocines with diverse intramolecular connectivity to maneuver optoelectronic properties.

title: Application of hydrogels based on carbon dots and rare earths in dual-wavelength UV excitation adjustable multicolor fluorescence
abstract: This study presents a multifunctional hydrogel engineered by integrating carbon dots (CDots) and lanthanide metal ions (Ln 3+ ), which exhibits tunable multicolor fluorescence under dual-wavelength UV excitation (254 nm and 365 nm).

title: Metal halide perovskites as gate dielectrics for transistor applications: progress and perspectives
abstract: This perspective discusses metal halide perovskites (MHPs) as gate dielectrics for transistor-based devices. The authors discuss the electrolytic dielectric characteristics of MHPs, focusing on understanding the dielectric polarizability of MHPs.

title: Dimerized small molecule acceptors featuring isomeric benzodithiophene linkers for organic solar cells
abstract: Dimerized small molecule acceptors are constructed by linker isomerization strategy with centrosymmetric benzodithiophene (BDT) and its axisymmetric isomer (i-BDT) as the linkers to modulate packing morphologies and photovoltaic performance.

title: Circularly polarized organic light-emitting diodes with chiral asymmetric [Ir(C 1 ^N 1 )(C 2 ^N 2 )(L^X)]-tris-heteroleptic iridium( iii ) complexes
abstract: Two chiral trinary heteroleptic Ir( iii ) isomers were synthesized and separated with high PLQYs of 97%, an EQE max of 22.3% and a | g PL | of 1.92 × 10 −3 , respectively.

title: Violet light excitable K x Na 5 −x B 2 P 3 O 13 :Eu ( x = 0, 1, 2) borophosphates as novel phosphors for multifunctional applications
abstract: Three novel Eu 2+ -doped blue-emitting phosphate phosphors, K x Na 5− x B 2 P 3 O 13 ( x = 0, 1, 2), were successfully synthesized via a conventional high-temperature solid-state reaction method.

title: Quadrupole moments determine the crystal structures of organic semiconductors
abstract: A two-dimensional plot of in-plane quadrupole moments in organic semiconductors provides a phase diagram of their crystal structures.

title: Heterostructured SN@BAPC composite design via coordinated structure–morphology modulation: the mechanism of electromagnetic wave dissipation
abstract: SN@BAPC-C exhibited an RL min of −42.32 dB with a 3.12 GHz EAB at 1.7 mm, while SN@BAPC-P achieved an RL min of −38.36 dB and an ultra-wide EAB of 7.12 GHz at 2.1 mm.

title: Self-driven near-infrared photodetectors based on Sb 2 Te 3 /n-Si heterostructures with low dark current and fast response
abstract: Our method presents a potential application of topological insulator-based photodetectors as a promising candidate for infrared imaging systems.

title: Strain-tuning of perpendicular magnetic anisotropy and valley topological phase transition in the SVNH monolayer
abstract: Materials that exhibit both perpendicular magnetic anisotropy and the valley-polarized quantum anomalous Hall phenomenon provide a pathway for the application of valleytronics.

title: Cage-based hydrogen-bonded organic frameworks: a systematic review
abstract: Hydrogen-bonded organic framework (HOF) materials represent a novel category of porous materials that have attracted considerable attention owing to their mild synthesis conditions, self-healing capabilities, and recyclability.

title: ortho -π-Extension of perylene diimides via one-pot annulation of imidazo[1,2- a ]pyridine or imidazo[1,2- a ]pyrazine for n-type organic field-effect transistors
abstract: We report ortho π-extended perylene diimide derivatives, PDI-IPD and PDI-IPZ. Both compounds exhibit n-type semiconductor characteristics in organic field-effect transistors (OFETs). Notably, PDI-IPZ achieves electron mobility of 0.116 cm 2 V −1 s −1 .

title: Low-temperature synthesis of mixed valence gold halide perovskites and exploration of their photoluminescence properties
abstract: We describe the structural and chemical properties of gold halide perovskites (Cs 2 Au I Au III X 6 , X = I, Br, Cl) synthesized at low temperatures. Photoluminescence shows bandgaps (1–1.4 eV), highlighting their potential for optoelectronic devices.

title: Dynamic processes of multimodal luminescence in long persistent phosphors
abstract: We developed Sr 3 Lu 2 Ge 3 O 12 :M phosphors and systematically studied their dopant-dependent luminescence and fluorescence kinetics, revealing a trap-mediated multimodal emission mechanism through TL analysis.

title: Advancements and hurdles in contact engineering for miniaturized sub-micrometer oxide semiconductor devices
abstract: For DRAM node downscaling, planar oxide-channel transistors must transition to VCT. This review explores strategies to reduce contact resistance, including conductive region formation, n + layer insertion, metal selection, and surface engineering.

title: Improving the memory window of a ferroelectric thin film transistor using an atomic layer deposited HfN x interfacial layer
abstract: This work examines the impact of atomic-layer-deposited 1-nm-thick HfN x interfacial layer and NH 3 annealing on the ferroelectric properties of Hf 0.5 Zr 0.5 O 2 capacitors and ferroelectric thin-film transistors with an amorphous InGaZnO channel.

title: Superhydrophilic CuO nanowire QCM humidity sensor with horsefly-inspired self-cleaning ability applied for non-contact detection
abstract: Superhydrophilic CuO nanowire QCM humidity sensor with a micro-pit array self-cleaning layer inspired by horseflies, applied for non-contact detection.

title: Boosting charge transfer with MoS 2 -grafted MXene interlayers for high-efficiency all-inorganic CsPbBr 3 perovskite solar cells with an ultrahigh voltage of 1.701 V
abstract: Two-dimensional MXene nanoflakes grafted with MoS 2 QDs are used as multifunctional interlayers at the perovskite/carbon interface in all-inorganic CsPbBr 3 perovskite solar cells, achieving a 10.70% efficiency with an ultrahigh V oc of 1.701 V.

title: Engineered heterointerfaces and defects in the PBA-derived NiFeSe@C nanocomposite for high-efficiency electromagnetic wave absorption
abstract: Heterointerface engineering and defect manipulation have emerged as promising strategies for designing high-performance electromagnetic wave absorbers.

title: MOF-derived TiO 2 nano-disks decorated with Pt nanoparticles for enhanced acetone sensing
abstract: Platinum (Pt)-modified titanium dioxide (TiO 2 ) nanodisks, derived from metal–organic frameworks (MOFs), were developed to enhance the detection of volatile organic compounds (VOCs), particularly acetone.

title: Defect-passivated InGaZnO/In 2 O 3 stacked thin-film transistors with visible-light-assisted recovery for room-temperature ppb-level NO 2 detection
abstract: IGZO in a stacked structure functions as a defect-passivating layer to enhance NO 2 detection.

title: Revealing frontier energy levels in blended mixed-halide perovskite thin films with electrochemistry
abstract: We determine perovskite frontier energy levels across the visible spectrum using low-power tabletop electrochemistry, which utilizes a hydrofluoroether electrolyte toolkit.

title: The GaN/MgAl 2 S 4 heterojunction: an excellent candidate material for photodetectors
abstract: The GaN/MgAl 2 S 4 van der Waals heterojunction is successfully constructed, demonstrating exceptional photodetection capabilities with a photocurrent peak of 0.818 a 0 2 per photon and an extinction ratio peak of 222.25.

title: Sensitized near-infrared lanthanide emission in chalcogenide perovskites
abstract: Semiconductor materials capable of hosting luminescent lanthanide ions (Ln 3+ ) and sensitize their emission are scarce.

title: Electrically erasable multi-level charge trapping memory with metal nanoparticle engineering for organic synaptic transistors
abstract: An electrically erasable multi-level charge trapping memory is proposed for organic synaptic transistors, employing metal nanoparticle engineering.

title: Greenish yellow-emitting carbon dot-based films for luminescent solar concentrator applications
abstract: The CDs@EVA #3 film in LSC enhances short-circuit current by 1.17 times, primarily through conversion of UV and short visible light into longer wavelengths.

title: Single-layer HfN 2 : symmetric scaling behavior in CMOS transistors
abstract: Efficient operation of complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (CMOS) integrated circuits (ICs) requires good symmetry between NMOS and PMOS transistors to ensure fast signal processing and logic operations.

title: Design of a switchable and tunable terahertz metamaterial absorber with broadband, ultra-broadband, and dual-broadband absorption based on graphene and vanadium dioxide
abstract: This work develops a switchable and tunable terahertz metamaterial absorber based on graphene and vanadium dioxide (VO 2 ).

title: NiCo 2 S 4 @NiCo 2 Se 4 in situ grown on carbon cloth for performance-enhanced supercapacitor electrodes
abstract: NiCo 2 S 4 @NiCo 2 Se 4 core–shell in situ grown on carbon cloth yields a high specific capacitance of 12.87 F cm −2 at 1 mA cm −2 .

title: Morphology control through incorporation of an asymmetric small molecule donor for efficient ternary organic solar cells
abstract: Incorporating a small molecule containing an asymmetric core as the third component can regulate the morphology for high-efficiency ternary organic solar cells.

title: Enhanced piezoelectric properties and electrical resistivity of Na + /Nd 3+ co-doped Ca 1− x (Na 1/2 Nd 1/2 ) x Bi 4 Ti 4 O 15 ceramics for high-temperature applications
abstract: Co-doped high-valence Aurivillius Ca 1− x (Na 1/2 Nd 1/2 ) x Bi 4 Ti 4 O 15 ceramics exhibit high resistivity from altered conduction & fewer oxygen vacancies, along with enhanced piezoelectricity via greater distortion & grain size, enabling high-temp (>600 °C) use.

title: A hydrogel-ionic polymer blend for humidity-insensitive ion gradient driven electricity generation
abstract: Hydrogel-ionic polymer blends enable sustained generation of electricity driven by the diffusion of the mobile ions.

title: Trivalent europium complex nanocrystals: fine-tuning luminescence properties with a micellar dipole vector shell for fingerprint development
abstract: Here, emission of Eu( iii ) complex nanocrystal solution is enhanced via increasing the permanent dipole moment of reversely micellar surfactant.

title: Molecular tailoring of 2PACz SAMs via substituent design enables efficient inverted p–i–n perovskite solar cells
abstract: Substituent engineering of 2PACz-based SAMs enables energy level tuning for efficient charge extraction in inverted PSCs. MeO-2PACz achieves 21.67% PCE and enhanced stability, showcasing effective interface molecular design.

title: Non-halogenated solvent additive-mediated donor–acceptor phase segregation leads to efficient all-polymer solar cells
abstract: Non-halogenated solvent additives were employed to boost the crystallinity of the active layer and optimize donor–acceptor phase separation, thereby realizing efficient all-polymer organic solar cells.

title: Chiral lanthanide complexes in the history of circularly polarized luminescence: a brief summary
abstract: Chiral lanthanide complexes with circularly polarized luminescence.

title: Low-cost and fast-thermal-response Mo–PVA/PNIPAM hydrogel-based smart windows for monitoring indoor temperature under hot environments
abstract: The Mo–PVA/PNIPAM hydrogel can regulate indoor temperature as the smart window. Based on the temperature phase transformation and the photothermal conversion ability, the hydrogel can keep indoor cooling in the hot summer without energy consumption.

title: Bidirectional luminescence modulation of BTO:Yb/Er ferroelectric films based on phase transition
abstract: Lanthanide-activated ferroelectric films exhibit dynamic and reversible luminescence modulation under external electric fields, making them promising candidates for applications in optical communication and information storage.

title: Highly enhanced thermoelectric performance of halogen element modified SnSe 2 materials via point defect engineering
abstract: In this study, bulk SnSe 2 samples singly doped with halogen elements were synthesized, and the Cl-doped SnSe 2 exhibited the most TE performance. The engineering of point defects through halogen doping proves effective in enhancing TE performance.

title: Intrinsic magnetism in semiconducting bulk amorphous tellurium
abstract: We report doping-free magnetism in semiconducting amorphous Te, revealing intrinsic magnetic sites arising from hypervalent structural distortions unlike non-magnetic crystalline Te.

title: Design of low-lattice-mismatch type-I heterostructures of zinc chalcogenide and synthesis of ZnTeS quantum dots as key materials for realizing green and red emission
abstract: Green- and red-emissive type-I nano-heterostructures with a small lattice mismatch at the interfaces were designed based on calculations of the band alignment in ZnTeS alloys, which exhibit large band gap bowing.

title: Multifunctional Zn–carbon dots enhanced specific recognition and in situ degradation of tetracycline
abstract: A simple yet effective strategy for detecting and in situ degrading tetracycline offers an innovative dual-purpose solution for treating organic pollutants.

title: Cyclohexylmethylammonium iodide-based bilateral interface engineering for efficient perovskite solar cells with improved stability and negligible hysteresis
abstract: Cyclohexylmethylammonium iodide (CMI)-based double-sided passivation treatment enables efficient n–i–p perovskite solar cells with improved stability and negligible hysteresis.

title: A multi-resonance TADF non-conjugated copolymer with near-unity photoluminescence quantum yield for efficient solution-processed OLEDs
abstract: Steric hindrance effects, MR-TADF, and TSCT have been integrated into non-conjugated polymers to achieve highly efficient MR-TADF emission with near-unity PLQY. Solution-processed OLEDs achieve a maximum external quantum efficiency (EQE) of 12.7%.

title: Integrating unwonted photoluminescence and anti-thermal quenching in Ba 2 MgTeO 6 double perovskites for high-performance optical thermometers
abstract: This study investigates the unusual photoluminescence and anti-thermal quenching behaviour of Eu 3+ -activated Ba 2 MgTeO 6 double perovskites, with a view to developing highly sensitive optical thermometers.

title: Centimeter-scale Gua 3 SbBr 6 single crystals for white light-emitting diodes enabled by inhibition of multi-site nucleation
abstract: We presents a technique to grow large Gua 3 SbBr 6 single crystal for WLEDs by adding zinc acetate, regulating crystal growth and light emission and enabling WLEDs with near-perfect white light, CRI of 89, and 48.6 lm/W efficiency.

title: Efficient near-infrared luminescence in a Na 2 CaTi 2 Ge 3 O 12 :Cr 3+ garnet for light-emitting-diode applications
abstract: An efficient broadband near-infrared Na 2 CaTi 2 Ge 3 O 12 :Cr 3+ garnet phosphor with cationic disorder and charge self-balance achieves a high performance in near-infrared imaging.

title: Regulating crystallization in wide-bandgap perovskite with removable additives for an expanded processing window contributes to efficient tandem solar cells
abstract: A removable additive delays solvent evaporation, extends the processing window, and enables controlled crystallization, producing high-quality wide-bandgap perovskite films and achieving a PCE of 23.55% in perovskite-organic tandem solar cells.

title: Crystallinity-tuned Cu 3 P nanoparticles constructed through solvothermal phosphidization of metal–organic frameworks for electrocatalytic nitrate reduction to ammonia
abstract: Amorphous Cu 3 P nanoparticles synthesized via solvothermal phosphidization demonstrate enhanced electrocatalytic activity for nitrate reduction and promising applications in dual-functional Zn–NO 3 − battery systems.

title: A sprayable H-bonding coumarin-containing compound for photoalignment of liquid crystals on a curved surface
abstract: A coumarin-containing compound can be sprayed onto a curved substrate surface and solidifies rapidly due to intermolecular hydrogen bonding and can induce alignment of liquid crystals after exposure to linearly polarized UV light.

title: Three-dimensional flower-like organic-dye-intercalated layered double hydroxide composite for efficient photocatalysis in heterogeneous flow chemistry
abstract: A rose bengal intercalated layered double hydroxide composite photocatalyst demonstrates excellent catalytic activity in heterogeneous flow chemistry to achieve a very rapid organic synthesis under visible-light irradiation powered by LEDs.

title: All-small-molecule ternary organic solar cells with 16.26% efficiency enabled by an iodinated electron acceptor
abstract: Incorporating BO-4I optimizes ternary all-small-molecule solar cells, achieving 16.26% efficiency via enhanced crystallinity and morphology control.

title: Multifunctional light-emitting materials based on hybrid copper iodide compounds
abstract: A series of multinuclear copper iodide complexes present high photoluminescence quantum yields. Their composite materials exhibit luminescence thermochromism and can be used as phosphors in LEDs and as inks in anti-counterfeiting systems.

title: Marcus inverted region in organic long-persistent luminescence host–guest systems designed from thermally activated delayed fluorescence molecules: a mechanistic study
abstract: OLPL can be observed by doping TADF guest molecules into specific host materials, the mechanism of which is revealed using theoretical investigation.

title: Paraelectric behavior and lamellar ordering in zwitterion-polymer blends
abstract: We report the synthesis and dielectric characterization of a zwitterionic compound based on two common ionic liquid moieties.

title: In situ synthesis of cadmium selenide quantum dots in solvent-free polymer templates demonstrating stable photoluminescence in a harsh atmosphere
abstract: CdSe QDs grown in PVC or PVDF via heating show controllable growth and high PL yield due to halogen coordination. They're stable in humid, acidic, alkaline, and ethanol environments.

title: Nanoscale Y 2 SrZnO 5 :Eu 3+ luminescent inks: enhancing security and stability via triple excitation for advanced anti-counterfeiting measures
abstract: We report a novel Eu 3+ -doped Y 2 SrZnO 5 ink that exhibits intense red emission via an exceptional triple excitation. Its photostability and multi-environment durability enable secure and counterfeit-resistant authentication of documents and currency.

title: Star block copolymer POEGMA- b -P3HT enables tunable charge transport in organic field-effect transistors
abstract: Star-shaped POEGMA- b -P3HT exhibits isotropic behavior, phase-separated nanostructures with ambipolar characteristics.

title: Sn 2+ -coordinated polyethylenimine as an electron transport layer for high-efficiency and stable inverted organic solar cells
abstract: Polyethylenimine (PEI) modified with tin( ii ) ions serves as an effective electron transport layer in inverted polymer solar cells, achieving a power conversion efficiency (PCE) of 17.5%, which exceeds the 15.7% PCE of traditional PEI-based devices.

title: Metal surface effects on single upconverting nanoparticle luminescence and thermometry signals
abstract: The emission intensity of individual upconverting nanoparticles (UCNPs) on metal surfaces is determined by an interplay between quenching and reflection effects, while the ratiometric thermometry signal is unaffected by the underlying material.

title: Assembly of intrinsic chiral gold nanorods within a cholesteric liquid crystal host with tunable optical asymmetry
abstract: This work has clearly demonstrated the construction of c-Au NRs in a CLC host with widely tunable optical asymmetry. The pitch and helical axis of c-Au NR assemblies have been identified as the main factors in dynamically tuning the g -factor.

title: Impact of oxygen vacancy reduction on the dielectric, energy storage, and electrocaloric properties of annealed BCZT ceramic
abstract: This study shows that post-sintering annealing reduces oxygen vacancy-induced degradation in BCZT ceramics, enhancing dielectric, piezoelectric, and electrocaloric properties through improved structural integrity and defect control.

title: Sensitivity augmentation in multimodal optical thermometry based on NaBi (MoO 4 ) 2 :Yb 3+ ,Er 3+ @NaBi(MoO 4 ) 2 :Yb 3+ ,Ho 3+ core@shell nanoparticles
abstract: Core@shell nanomaterials with high relative temperature sensitivity ( S r ) and a broad sensing range are synthesized for real-world applications of luminescence thermometry.

title: Impact of crystallinity and local disorder on the luminescence properties of solvothermally synthesized LuPO 4 :Pr 3+ nanocrystals
abstract: Annealing LuPO 4 :Pr 3+ nanocrystals reduces local disorder and structural imperfections, enabling efficient energy transfer under deep high-energy excitation (45 eV photons), thereby enhancing UV-C luminescence for potential use in radiotherapy.

title: Equilibrating bonding energy between solvent and solute for optimized crystallization enables efficient perovskite solar cells
abstract: Solvent engineering by introducing δ-valerolactone into DMF/DMSO mix-solvents for balancing solvent–solute interactions and diminishing the transformation barrier of α-FAPbI 3 .

title: Tin–lead perovskite solar cells featuring buffer layer structures: a combined theoretical and experimental study
abstract: The insertion of the PCBM buffer layer blocks hole migration and facilitates electron transport.

title: Improving the performance of polarization conversion in the near-infrared with low insertion loss by the metasurface
abstract: When operating in the near-infrared band (NIB), the performance of a linear to circular polarization conversion (LTCPC) metasurface (MS) is significantly impacted by the electromagnetic loss and the device will generate plenty of thermal radiation.

title: Achieving multi-stimuli-responsive and color-tunable luminescence from ultralong organic phosphorescent materials
abstract: A facile approach enables multi-stimuli-responsive and steady-state color-tunable luminescence in UOP materials by regulating multimode emissions, allowing direct visualization-based applications in multicolor patterning and visual monitoring system.

title: Core–shell energy band engineering of cyan light-emitting ternary ZnGa 2 S 4 @ZnS quantum dots toward anti-counterfeiting and bioimaging applications
abstract: ZnGa 2 S 4 @ZnS was constructed according to the core–shell energy band engineering principle, and these cadmium-free cyan-emitting quantum dots are of paramount importance for application in anti-counterfeiting and bioimaging.

title: Suppression of phase segregation in red CsPbIBr 2 -based perovskite LECs/LEDs: impact of Mn doping, crystallization control, and grain passivation
abstract: As alternatives to conventional perovskite light-emitting diodes, perovskite light-emitting electrochemical cells (PeLECs) are in great demand in modern science and technology due to their simplified structure and attainable higher luminance.

title: Tuning the charge transfer and band shape of donor–acceptor covalent organic frameworks for optoelectronics
abstract: Based on DFT/TD-DFT calculations and band structure analysis, the optically-induced charge transfer and effective mass values of a series of 2D COF monolayers are evaluated, as well as the correlation between the two properties.

title: Magnetic properties and dipolar interactions of Fe 3 O 4 nanoparticle clusters produced by bottom-up self-assembly
abstract: Size-controlled Fe 3 O 4 clusters show enhanced dipolar interactions, impacting magnetic properties. A model reveals dipolar fields, energy barriers, and relaxation dynamics, supporting biomedical and other advanced applications.

title: Half-metallicity induced by spin–orbit coupling in the superstructured perovskite Ca 2 TiRuO 6
abstract: The synthesis process and the characterisation of structural, morphological, compositional, optical, electrical and magnetic properties of the Ca 2 TiRuO 6 material are described and analysed.

title: Preparation of thermochromic cholesteric liquid crystal microcapsules with a planar alignment via stepwise interfacial polymerization
abstract: In this study, thermochromic microcapsules with excellent optical properties were fabricated by combining stepwise heated interfacial polymerization and pre-alignment in the smectic phase, and coatings with high reflectivity were achieved.

title: Crystal facet tailoring: a promising pathway toward high-performance Y 2/3 Cu 3 Ti 4 O 12 thermosensitive ceramics
abstract: Y 2/3 Cu 3 Ti 4 O 12 (YCTO) thermosensitive ceramics with high-sensitivity and fast-response characteristics have potential applications in the next generation of smart electronic devices.

title: Conductive fibres constructed on fully self-healing elastomer fibres via an electrospinning approach
abstract: This manuscript presents the synthesis and electrospinning of novel self-healing polymer fibres.

title: Quantum spin sensors for open-shell molecules
abstract: Spin sensors based on zigzag graphene nanoribbons (ZGNRs) can detect open-shell molecules by exploiting quantum interference induced spin current.

title: Beyond silicon: a roadmap for overcoming the five challenges (5Cs) in molecular computing
abstract: Molecular electronics, which utilizes individual molecules as electronic components, presents a promising alternative to traditional transistors, especially as we approach the physical and economic limitations of silicon technology.

title: Engineering morphological features and surface steps in ultrathick penta-twinned copper nanowires
abstract: Hydrothermal synthesis with glycine as a templating agent yields CuNWs with tunable aspect ratios and distinct surface crystal facets.

title: Biodegradable CMC/Zn/Ca/Cu cross-linked novel superabsorbent hydrogel bead for plant pathogen prevention and agricultural applications
abstract: CMC/Zn/Ca/Cu cross-linked biodegradable hydrogel bead for multinutrient fertilizer delivery showing optimal growth pattern of Solanum lycopersicum L. and effective against a plant pathogen Ralstonia solanacearum F1C1.

title: Broadband photodetection and artificial visual synapses enabled by the photovoltaic and photoconductive effects of 2H-MoTe 2 /WSe 2 heterojunction
abstract: Endowed with photovoltaic and photoconductive effects, the 2H-MoTe 2 /WSe 2 heterojunction enables the realization of broadband photodetection and low-power artificial visual synapses.

title: 2D and quasi-2D halide perovskite-based artificial synapses: highlights
abstract: The field of neuromorphic computing has seen significant advancements through the development of artificial synapses, with two-dimensional (2D) and quasi-2D halide perovskites emerging as key materials in this area.

title: Investigation of nonlinear optical properties in GaN nanoparticles and nanosheets spanning deep ultraviolet to near-infrared wavelengths
abstract: The nonlinear optical behavior of the wide bandgap semiconductor gallium nitride (GaN), manifested in both its nanoparticle and nanosheet forms, has garnered significant attention.

title: Achieving ultra-high anisotropy in thermal conductivity of plastic crystals through megapascal pressure via hot pressing
abstract: Significant modulation of thermal conductivity anisotropy is achieved in [(CH 3 ) 4 N][FeCl 4 ] films by applying uniaxial hot pressing pressure.

title: Transforming biomass waste sauce-flavor liquor lees into porous carbons for high-performance aqueous zinc-ion hybrid capacitors
abstract: The biomass sauce-flavor liquor lees-derived carbon cathodes are specially designed for aqueous zinc-ion hybrid supercapacitors. And which achieved a high specific capacity (221.1 mA h g −1 ), a high energy density (160.9 W h kg −1 ) and remarkable durability.

title: Oxide-based bionic hetero-dendritic neuron with capabilities of Bienenstock–Cooper–Munro learning activities
abstract: A multi-gate sodium alginate/graphene oxide gated oxide hetero-dendritic neuron was proposed, demonstrating high-pass filter characteristics and BCM learning rules under the spike-timing-dependent plasticity and heterosynaptic mechanism.

title: Self-assembly behaviour of telechelic polyethylene glycol with triptycene termini capable of two-dimensional ordering
abstract: When a tripodal triptycene with strong 2D assembling ability is incorporated into both termini of a poly(ethylene glycol), the polymer chains are accommodated between the 2D triptycene arrays, giving rise to a periodic lamellar structure.

title: Suppressing efficiency roll-off of orange-red thermally activated delayed fluorescence polymer-based OLEDs via copolymerizing co-hosts with cascade energy levels
abstract: A series of orange-red TADF polymers incorporating dibenzothiophene, dibenzofuran and carbazole units as co- backbones are successfully synthesized. These polymers demonstrate enhanced photophysical properties, achieving an EQE max of 17.1% in OLEDs.

title: Interconnected donor–acceptor-additive effects on the microstructure and device performance of PM6 : Y6 solar cells
abstract: Optimizing the donor:acceptor ratio or using solvent additives in PM6 : Y6 blends drives the formation of a single, well-mixed phase, where Y6 diffusion is constrained, enhancing charge generation, transport, and device efficiency.

title: Effect of water treatment on microstructure and magnon thermal transport in spin ladder compound Sr 12 Y 2 Cu 24 O 41
abstract: We show that water-induced decomposition reduces magnon thermal conductivity in a spin-ladder polycrystal, while the absence of grain boundaries or a metal coating prevents degradation, ensuring stability for thermal management applications.

title: Antibonding Cu (d)–Te (p) states and bonding inhomogeneity in inducing low lattice thermal conductivity and extraordinary thermoelectric properties of the layered heteroanionic NdCuOTe material: a first-principles study
abstract: Layered NdCuOTe material exhibits excellent thermoelectric properties on account of the bonding inhomogeneity, antibonding state, and band degeneracy.

title: Strong polarization in paraelectric tungsten–bronze systems via bond engineering
abstract: A bond engineering strategy was implemented in the Bi 3+ -substituted Ba 4 Nd 28/3 Ti 18 O 54 bulk, where softened Ti–O bonds and reduced oxygen octahedral tilting angles contributed to a superior dielectric performance of high- κ ∼200 and low loss of 10 −4 .

title: Spin–phonon coupling and antisite disorder in ferrimagnetic double perovskite Ca 2 CrRuO 6
abstract: Ferrimagnetic double perovskite Ca 2 CrRuO 6 exhibiting a delicate balance between antisite disorder and Cr 3+ –O 2− –Ru 5+ superexchange interactions governing its structural and magnetic properties.

title: Vertical graphene and nanodiamond composited films prepared by loading monodispersed molybdenum atoms and annealing
abstract: Graphene/nanodiamond composited films, normally prepared by chemical vapor deposition, have attracted considerable attention due to their exceptional performance in terms of electrochemical properties, hardness and wear resistance.

title: Smart quadruplicate information coding and hazard sensing, with dual UV/IR excitation, in 2D fine images of Eu 3+ /Tb 3+ /Zn 2+ hyaluronan nanoaggregates and NaGdF 4 :Yb,Er nanoparticles
abstract: Information storage and anti-counterfeiting application of dual-mode luminescent inks.

title: Influence of shape on crystal structure and optical properties of heterocyclic conjugated molecules
abstract: Multi-ring, thiophene based heterocycles participate in discrete non-covalent interactions that dictate crystal packing of conjugated molecules, which also form a variety of polymorphs with different optical properties.

title: Layered perovskite-type Nd 2 Ti 2 O 7 energy-storage ceramics with ultrahigh E b (∼1.4 MV cm −1 ) and large E g (∼3.76 eV)
abstract: Nd 2 Ti 2 O 7 ceramics with simple compositions exhibit ultra-high breakdown electric fields and excellent energy storage performance. They also exhibit excellent frequency (0.1–200 Hz) and temperature (20–180 °C) stability.

title: Donor dilution in D18:L8-BO organic solar cells: visualization of morphology and effects on device characteristics
abstract: D18:L8-BO solar cells with a reduced donor concentration exhibit still significant power conversion efficiencies due to extended polymer fibrils of the donor leading to an interpenetrating network.

title: Enhancing NO 2 gas sensing with ZnO/W 18 O 49 heterostructures: experimental insights and DFT analysis
abstract: An advanced NO 2 gas sensor based on a ZnO/W x O y heterostructure has been developed, demonstrating effective performance at both room and high temperatures.

title: High-quality blade-coated CH 3 NH 3 PbI 3 perovskite thick films for high-performance X-ray detection
abstract: X-ray detector with a structure of ITO/MAPbI 3 thick film/carbon electrode shows a low dark current drift, large μτ product, high sensitivity, low detection limit, and good long-term operational stability.

title: A simple medium-bandgap quinoidal A–D–A non-fullerene acceptor for ternary organic solar cells
abstract: A closed-shell quinoidal D–A–D molecule constructed from CPDT was introduced as guest acceptor in PBDB-T:Y6 active layer to fabricate ternary outdoor and indoor OSCs.

title: Automated manufacturing of segmented nanowires with thin ferromagnetic layers: a step towards miniature SFS Josephson junctions
abstract: A superconductor–ferromagnet–superconductor Josephson junction based on a single segmented nanowire has been prepared using a CNC electrochemical system.

title: Ionic side-chain engineering in conjugated polyelectrolytes for high-performance pseudocapacitors
abstract: The cationic CPE-Br outperforms the anionic CPE-K in pseudocapacitor applications, delivering higher capacitance, improved rate performance, and faster ion diffusion, attributed to suppressed self-doping and enhanced anion accessibility.

title: Engineering a covalently linked NH 2 –TiN@PCN-222-Co single atom-based photocatalyst for solar-driven CO 2 -to-CO conversion
abstract: Schematic illustration of the charge transfer mechanism for CO 2 photoreduction over a single atom-based TiN@PCN nanocomposite with TEOA as the sacrificial agent under sunlight irradiation.

title: Flexible mechano-optical sensors from mechanoluminescence to mechanoplasmonics: designs, applications, and prospects
abstract: This review summarizes the mechanisms, developments, and applications of flexible mechano-optical sensors using mechanoluminescence and mechanoplasmonics for robust sensing applications, while addressing challenges and prospects for their integration.

title: Development of an electronic skin based on piezoelectric porous PVDF nanospheres for robotic perception
abstract: With the rapid advancement of robotics and human–robot interactions, electronic skins (e-skins) have demonstrated great potential in robotics.

title: Synergistic dye/photocatalyst interconnections for activating efficient light-induced degradation pathways
abstract: Perovskite materials are prepared by reprecipitation using different crystallization solvents which impact their morphological and surface properties. These systems are particularly active in the photodegradation of halogen-containing xanthene dyes.

title: Stress-coupled spin state switching in a spin crossover composite modulates current in an organic semiconductor
abstract: A strain-coupled bilayer heterostructure, composed of a spin-crossover composite and an organic semiconductor exhibits reversible conductance modulation driven by thermally induced spin-state switching.

title: Enhanced light harvesting in lead-free Cs 2 AgBiBr 6 double perovskite solar cells with plasmonic Ag nanoparticles
abstract: The far-field light scattering and near-field enhancement of Ag nanoparticles synergistically facilitate a remarkable improvement in absorption in Cs 2 AgBiBr 6 lead-free double perovskite solar cells.

title: Highly efficient orange luminescence in Sn 2+ -doped Cs 2 AgInCl 6 double perovskite with a large Stokes shift
abstract: Cs 2 AgInCl 6 : x Sn 2+ with orange luminescence exhibits a large Stokes shift (360 nm) and enhanced PLQY in the visible range. The fabricated WLED shows an appropriate CCT and high R a , indicating its potential application in optoelectronic devices.

title: Room-temperature synthesis of highly luminescent methylammonium lead bromide nanocubes encapsulated in block copolymer micelles: impact of solvent choice on crystallization and stability
abstract: The choice of solvent (methanol and DMF) for transporting MA + and Br − ions from the TMB phase to the micelle core significantly influences the dimensions of the resulting MAPbBr 3 perovskite.

title: Effect of shell ratio on Mn/Co 2+/3+ cation distribution and exchange anisotropy behavior in spinel interphase supported Mn 2 O 3 –Co 3 O 4 nanostructures
abstract: Schematic representation of the rearrangement of magnetic spins at specific points of the hysteresis loops due to the AFM/FIM coupling, resulting in shifted ZFC–FC hysteresis loops, i.e. , exchange bias (EB).

title: Piezoelectric performance of porous structure piezoceramics for Gyroids based on digital additive manufacturing technology
abstract: Gyroid-structured piezoceramics fabricated via DLP exhibit an 85% higher piezoelectric coefficient and 8× greater energy harvesting efficiency than conventional solid ceramics.

title: A low-power filamentary memristor crossbar array enabled via cubic α-phase stabilized mixed-cation lead halide perovskites
abstract: A schematic of cubic α-phase stabilization in mixed-cation lead halide perovskites to enhance the nonvolatile switching performance and their 3 × 3 crossbar array for storage and retrieval of bitmap images.

title: Acquiring hybrid molecular crystal materials through high-throughput screening
abstract: Hybrid molecular crystal prediction flow and dielectric properties’ benchmarking: comparative analysis of the dielectric constants and band gaps with reference crystals.

title: Nickel–cobalt–manganese ternary electrodes with CEI film evolution via ORR-regulated pH modulation in zinc-ion batteries
abstract: In this work, a Ni–Co-based ORR-catalyzing electrode was prepared via electrodeposition and paired with a Mn-rich electrolyte to construct a novel ternary zinc-ion battery.

title: Direct synthesis of a BiOCl/TiO 2 spindle for enhanced visible-light photocatalytic oxidation of benzyl alcohol
abstract: The development of highly efficient photocatalytic systems for alcohol oxidation represents a promising strategy to mitigate escalating environmental pollution and energy challenges.

title: Plasticity tunable artificial synapses based on organic electrochemical transistors with aqueous electrolytes
abstract: By regulating ion transporting kinetics and ion diffusion distances in organic mixed ionic–electronic conductor channels, highly tunable short- and long-term plasticity are obtained in vOECTs with aqueous electrolytes.

title: Circularly polarized luminescence with large dissymmetry factors based on perovskite and cholesteric liquid crystal polymer network films
abstract: Based on perovskite and CLCN films, colour tuning, large | g lum | values, and handedness inversion of circularly polarized luminescence were achieved.

title: In situ construction of continuous porous AlN skeletons towards enhanced thermal conductivity of epoxy composites
abstract: A three-dimensional porous AlN skeleton was successfully constructed through an in situ reaction strategy, which was further used as a reinforcement to prepare epoxy-based composite with enhanced thermal conductivity and thermal stability.

title: Development of a colorimetric sensor based on a peroxidase-like Cu,Fe-TCPP metal–organic framework for detection of fleroxacin
abstract: A Cu,Fe-TCPP nanosheet with an infrared and ultrasound enhanced peroxidase-like activity was facilely synthesized and developed for sensitive and selective colorimetric detection of fleroxacin.

title: Tuning the excitation-regime-dependent nonlinear optical responses of Cu-doped NiO thin films for harmonic generation and ultrafast photonic applications
abstract: Excitation regime dependence of nonlinear optical responses of Cu:NiO thin films.

title: A polarization-passivation synergistic antisolvent strategy for high-brightness CsPbBr 3 QLEDs exceeding 100 000 cd m −2
abstract: The introduction of ZnBr 2 polarizes the antisolvent which removes the excessive insulating ligands, and passivates the defects, greatly improving the brightness and lifetime of QLED devices.

title: Chain-stiffening enhanced ultralong organic phosphorescence in high glass transition temperature polymers
abstract: A series of room-temperature phosphorescent polymers were successfully developed by synthesizing high glass-transition temperature polymers through stiffening the polymer chains.

title: Stretchable alternating current electroluminescent fiber based on transparent and highly conductive dual-network imidazolium chloride ion–gel electrodes for wearable display applications
abstract: Wearable displays are an ultimate form of signal sensing for individual safety and health, but the traditional displays used are typically flat and have complex electronics, leading to a lack of ease and comfort in wearing them.

title: Regulating the crystallization of tin oxide nanoparticles by an environmentally friendly poly-aluminum chloride additive for a high-quality electron transport film in perovskite solar cells
abstract: The film quality of the electron transport layers influences the photovoltaic performance of perovskite solar cells (PSCs) profoundly.

title: Cadmium defect-induced modulation of hole self-trapping in monoclinic gallium oxide for optoelectronic applications
abstract: Cd doping in β-Ga 2 O 3 significantly reduces the hole self-trapping and induces an intravalence state due to the formation of Cd Ga and V Ga acceptors, which promote the p-type conductivity in this material and make it promising for optoelectronics.

title: Singlet reservoir for multi-channel barrierless harvesting of keto triplet excitons for high-efficiency electroluminescence of an ESIPT fluorophore
abstract: A high-efficiency yellow ESIPT OLED emitter has been demonstrated via multi-channel effective hRISC to the high-lying singlet keto reservoir.

title: High stability of robust anti-thermal-quenching lead-free double perovskite crystals for optoelectronic devices and high-performance fibers
abstract: Sb 3+ -doped Cs 2 NaHoCl 6 perovskite crystals were synthesized through an efficient and energy-saving method. The flexible luminescent fibers prepared from Sb 3+ -doped Cs 2 NaHoCl 6 exhibit excellent luminescent stability in high-temperature environments.

title: Particle size-dependent viscoelastic Fe( ii )-triazole composites in the low-spin state
abstract: A series of soft viscoelastic spin crossover nanocomposite materials exhibiting critical gel behaviors has been prepared. The strong impact of the SCO particles on the viscoelastic properties of the organic polymer has been studied.

title: Organic circularly polarized luminescence materials in various aggregation states
abstract: This review aims to compare the construction, properties, regulation strategies, and mechanism exploration of organic CPL materials in different aggregation states, including crystals, supramolecular assemblies, polymers, and liquid crystals.

title: Intermediate- and high-temperature Li batteries with enhanced performance enabled by a hollow C-MoS 2 nanosphere electrode
abstract: Hollow MoS 2 nanospheres were synthesized via a scalable hydrothermal method. High specific capacity and cycling ability were achieved in intermediate- and high-temperature Li batteries. The working mechanism of MoS 2 in intermediate- and high-temperature Li batteries was revealed.

title: Surface ligand engineering of Ag 2 Te colloidal quantum dots for a self-powered shortwave infrared photodetector
abstract: Ag 2 Te colloid quantum dots (CQDs) are synthesized using bifunctional thiol ligands, and a high-performance and self-powered Ag 2 Te CQD-based shortwave infrared photodetector is constructed for non-contact pulse monitoring.

title: A mini review on the interfacial compatibility of propylene carbonate-based electrolytes with electrodes: origin, characterization, development and theoretical calculation
abstract: The research progresses of increase the compatibility between PC-based electrolytes and graphite anodes, have been reviewed.

title: Aggregation-induced phosphorescence Pt( ii ) complexes: molecular design strategies, mechanistic insights and applications
abstract: This review summarizes recent advances in AIP Pt( ii ) complexes, covering design strategies, photophysical mechanisms (RIM, RSDE, oxygen shielding), and applications in imaging, OLEDs, and sensing, while highlighting future development directions.

title: Adjustment and detection of the topology freezing transition temperature of vitrimers based on vitrimers doped with nanoparticles and photonic crystals
abstract: A physical method is proposed to adjust and detect T v of vitrimers based on vitrimers doped with SiO 2 nanoparticles and photonic crystals from SiO 2 nanoparticles. T v is decreased as the doping amount of SiO 2 nanoparticles is increased.

title: Molecularly thin organic single-crystalline p–n heterojunctions by interfacial heteroepitaxy for high-performance polarization-sensitive photodetectors
abstract: An interfacial heteroepitaxy strategy was developed to fabricate molecularly thin, single-crystalline p–n heterojunctions with precise orientation control and their polarization-sensitive photodetection capabilities were explored.

title: Tunable valley polarization and magnetic anisotropy by polarization reversal in a Ni 2 Cl 3 I 3 /AgBiP 2 S 6 heterojunction
abstract: Two-dimensional (2D) Janus trihalides have great potential applications in spintronics.

title: Non-Kekulé copolymer films for optoelectronics
abstract: Copolymers of graphitic carbon nitride and graphitic carbon (gCN- co -gC) are synthesized using melamine and glucose. They act as semiconductors with stable radicals, even in the dark and at room temperature.

title: A NiSe layer enhanced the efficiency of hole-conductor-free MAPbI 3 perovskite solar cells
abstract: The introduction of NiSe effectively reduces the defect density within the device and lowers the interfacial energy transfer barrier.

title: Ferromagnetic intercalated compounds CrHf x Te 2 with a magnetocaloric effect and negative magnetoresistance
abstract: Ferromagnetic intercalated compound CrHf x Te 2 demonstrates high-temperature magnetocaloric effects, robust relative cooling power and negative magnetoresistance, making it promising for advanced magnetic applications.

title: Robust graphene oxide composite films applicable to solar water evaporators prepared via covalent cross-linking
abstract: Covalently cross-linked GO-SSA composite films with enhanced toughness and strength are applicable as solar evaporators in the water purification field.

title: Yolk-double shell structured bread-like Si@Z-700N@void@C nanocomposites as high stability anodes for lithium-ion batteries
abstract: A yolk-double shell structured nanocomposite was used as an anode material for silicon-based lithium-ion batteries with excellent stability and cyclability.

title: Visible-light driven photoelectric synaptic transistors based on the ZnO/SnO 2 heterostructure for neuromorphic computing
abstract: Visible-light driven PSTs based on the ZnO/SnO 2 heterostructure fabricated by the sol–gel method are developed, by which various synaptic behaviors have been simulated and neuromorphic computing applications have been explored.

title: Magnetic proximity effect in biphenylene monolayer from first-principles
abstract: The magnetic proximity effect in the recently synthesized 2D carbon allotrope, biphenylene network (BPN), is explored through first-principles calculations, revealing a robust proximity-induced spin polarization in BPN without chemical modifications.

title: Enlarging the frequency threshold range of Bienenstock–Cooper–Munro rules in WO x -based memristive synapses by Al doping
abstract: By modifying the device itself, for instance by Al doping, the frequency threshold range of WO x -based memristive synapses is increased.

title: Layer-by-layer electropolymerization of o -methoxyaniline and hydroquinone for advanced aqueous zinc-ion energy storage
abstract: A one-pot layer-by-layer electropolymerization of o -methoxyaniline and hydroquinone yields nanostructured film with enhanced crystallinity and abundant redox-active sites for stable zinc-ion storage.

title: Highly conductive ion channels enable flexible actuators for robotic applications
abstract: Perpendicular ion channels generated by phase separation of polymer networks deliver high electrical and mechanical properties, enabling high-performance ionic actuators for soft robotic applications.

title: Doubling the efficiency of solution-processed blue phosphorescent organic light-emitting diodes via modified PEDOT : PSS hole-injection layers
abstract: High performance blue phosphorescent organic light-emitting diodes (OLEDs) with a modified PEDOT : PSS structure were obtained by utilizing a TCTA : POPH interfacial exciplex.

title: Tailoring core size, shell thickness, and aluminium doping of Au@ZnO core@shell nanoparticles
abstract: A novel colloidal synthesis approach for fabricating Au@ZnO core@shell nanoparticles with tunable core size, shell thickness, and Al dopant concentration.

title: Rational composition design of sesquioxide (Y,Sc,Lu) 2 O 3 single-crystal fibers for robust and high-sensitivity ultrasonic temperature sensing beyond 2100 °C
abstract: This work demonstrates a novel (Y,Sc,Lu) 2 O 3 single-crystal fiber ultrasonic temperature sensor for extreme environments. It achieves ultra-high temperature sensing up to 2100 °C, setting a new record for contact-type fiber temperature sensors.

title: Amorphous Ta 2 O 5 memristor with excellent self-selective and artificial synaptic properties for artificial neural networks
abstract: The Pt/ATO/IATO/TS memristor shows self-selective properties with large nonlinearity, a large s ratio, and good reliability. This memristor also exhibits synaptic properties; thus, it can be used for artificial neural networks.

title: Piezoelectricity in a mixture of chiral 1D hybrid lead bromide and iodide systems
abstract: A mixture of 1D chiral hybrid halides ( R -MBA)PbBr 3 and ( R -MBA)PbI 3 show higher piezoelectric output than each component. Incorporating it into a polymer matrix improves voltage response and mechanical flexibility, demonstrating a doormat sensor.

title: Room temperature piezotronic sensor based on sequentially integrated MXene electrodes and 2D tellurene for ultrasensitive acetone detection
abstract: A flexible piezotronic sensor using MXene/Te heterostructure was developed for selective, ultrasensitive acetone detection at room temperature. It shows strain enhanced response and outperforms GC-MS in cost, speed, and real world VOC analysis.

title: Effects of ligand coordination on Ag 8 SnS 6 as a photoabsorber for thin film solar cells
abstract: Ag 8 SnS 6 (ATS) nanoparticles, with a band gap of 1.35 eV which is located exactly at the Schockley–Queisser optimal value for a single-junction solar cell were utilized as a photoabsorber component in solid state photovoltaic devices.

title: Polypyrrole-decorated cellulose nanocrystal fillers in liquid crystal elastomers for multi-stimuli response
abstract: Polypyrrole-functionalized liquid crystal elastomers exhibiting response to near infrared (808 nm) light and thermal stimuli are reported.

title: Multimodal optical sensing based on a Sm 3+ -activated Sr 3 Sn 2 O 7 phosphor: stress visualization and temperature monitoring
abstract: Incorporating lithium into Sr 3 Sn 2 O 7 :Sm 3+ enhances its mechanoluminescence, enabling applications in stress visualization and temperature monitoring.

title: A polyurea interface structure with dual dynamic bonds endowing composites with synchronous self-healing and thermal conductivity properties
abstract: An integrated composite with dual dynamic bonds obtained by in situ polymerization of isophorone diisocyanate modified GO into polyurea achieves the coupling of thermal conductivity and self-healing properties.

title: Simultaneously enhanced piezoelectric properties and thermal stability of Pb(Zr, Ti)O 3 -based ceramics by a composition design strategy
abstract: This study enhances the piezoelectric properties and temperature stability of PZT-based piezoelectric ceramics by doping Nd 3+ and Nb 5+ at A and B sites, which regulates the phase structure, grain size, lattice distortion, and domain configuration.

title: Modifying the liquid crystalline chessboard tiling – soft reticular self-assembly of side-chain fluorinated polyphiles
abstract: Combining side-chain fluorination with core-fluorination provides access to new liquid crystalline honeycombs due to nano-segregation and competing tilt modes, either within or out of the crystallographic plane.

title: Electron scattering by Coulomb interactions of coupling agents for high insulating aramid films
abstract: An appropriate coupling agent can improve interfacial compatibility and strengthen interfacial interactions for better structural integrity. Its unique function of electron scattering can highly enhance the insulation properties.

title: Disordered structure with CaCu 5 type and uniaxial magneto-crystalline anisotropy induced by the high-entropy cocktail effect in Sm 2 Co 17 -based intermetallics
abstract: The high-entropy cocktail effect causes uniaxial anisotropy of (Sm 1/ n ⋯Rn 1/ n ) 2 (Fe 1/3 Co 1/3 Ni 1/3 ) 17 series high-entropy intermetallics.

title: Correction: Investigation of transcription factor–DNA binding with electrolyte-gated organic transistors
abstract: Correction for ‘Investigation of transcription factor–DNA binding with electrolyte-gated organic transistors’ by Matteo Sensi et al. , J. Mater. Chem. C , 2024, 12 , 7596–7604, https://doi.org/10.1039/D4TC00260A.

title: A flexible nanogenerator based on functionalized cotton fibers for energy harvesting in low-temperature environments
abstract: To address the performance degradation of flexible conductive materials and poor fatigue resistance in traditional flexible triboelectric nanogenerators (F-TENGs) at low temperatures, a novel low-temperature F-TENG was developed.

title: Chemically driven magnetic responsivity to multiple physical stimuli in a spin-crossover layered iron( ii )–rhenium( v ) framework
abstract: Two-dimensional iron( ii )–octacyanidorhenate( v ) coordination polymers contain an externally modulated interlayer solvent content which governs the magnetic response of the material to physical stimuli, including temperature, pressure, and light.

title: Barium substitution effects induced structural transitions, negative dielectric permittivity, and electrical conductivity behaviors in the GdCa 2− x Ba x Cu 3 O δ (0 ≤ x ≤ 2) structure
abstract: This study investigates the effects of substituting calcium with barium in GdCa 2− x Ba x Cu 3 O δ (0 ≤ x ≤ 2) compounds, focusing on the resultant structural, microstructural, and dielectric properties.

title: Molecular doping with 4-aminobenzylphosphonic acid for stable and efficient inverted perovskite solar cells
abstract: A 50 mV V OC improvement and a certified efficiency have been significantly achieved by ABPA molecular doping for FACs perovskite films towards stable and efficient PSCs.

title: Flexible organic crystal-quantum dot hybrids with adjustable waveguides
abstract: Organic crystals integrate multicolor emissions from semiconductor quantum dots via a modular assembly approach. This modular strategy merges the advantages of quantum dots and organic crystals for versatile photonics.

title: An ultrasensitive narrowband organic phototransistor for solar-blind ultraviolet detection and imaging
abstract: We design a novel hybrid-layered organic phototransistor (HLPT) as a solar-blind ultraviolet (SBUV) photodetector based on wide-band series materials.

title: Highly hydrophobic MXene/PS@polypropylene fabric for human posture recognition assisted by machine learning
abstract: MXene/PS@polypropylene fabric pressure sensors can detect yoga movements, and combined with deep belief networks, the accuracy of recognizing different movements exceeds 91%.

title: Metal bis(dithiolene) complexes with one dimensional structure: synthesis and application
abstract: Metal bis(dithiolene) complexes are emerging as promising candidates for functional organic materials. This review focuses on their synthesis and applications in organic thermoelectric devices and organic thin-film transistors.

title: Fused hexacyclic thienoquinoids terminated by indandione for low bandgap organic semiconductors
abstract: Two indandione-terminated quinoidal compounds with fused hexacyclic thiophene-thieno[3,2- b ]thiophene-thiophene as the core have been synthesized. The two compounds showed low bandgap and electron transport behaviour.

title: Insights into the greatly boosted red photoluminescence emission in Ga 2 O 3 :Eu 3+ /Ti 4+ composite ultrawide bandgap semiconductors
abstract: Ti 4+ doping not only increases the emission intensity and purity of emitted red light but also enhances the stability of emission intensity and chromaticity against temperature variation in Ga 2 O 3 :0.035Eu 3+ / y Ti 4+ phosphors.

title: Two-dimensional conjugated polymers with weakened interlayer interaction for highly sensitive visible responsiveness to compression stresses
abstract: Here, we have found that a new layered polydiacetylene (PDA) with weakened interlayer interactions exhibits visible color changes in response to weak compression stresses in the range of P = 2.5–125 MPa.

title: Tailoring electromagnetic interference shielding, electrical and thermal properties of poly(vinylidene fluoride) based hybrid nanocomposites with carbon nanofiber and magnetite nanoparticles
abstract: Enhanced dispersion of magnetite nanoparticles and carbon nanofibers in poly(vinylidene fluoride) helps in tailoring the electrical, mechanical, thermal and EMI shielding properties of hybrid nanocomposites for microwave absorption application.

title: Preparation of high gain NIR photodetectors based on gradient AgInS 2 (Se) thin films with A W −1 level responsivity
abstract: The development of cost-effective, large-area photodetectors using gradient AgInS 2 (Se) thin films offers broad-spectrum responsiveness, showing great potential for biological sensing, particularly in scenarios requiring W −1 level responsivity.

title: Piezoelectric composites for gas sensing: evolution of sensing and transduction designs
abstract: The development of piezoelectric composite (PEC) gas sensors is progressing rapidly, driven by innovations that range from atomic-level material design to system-level integration.

title: Vapor phase polymerization of thieno[3,4- b ]thiophene–tosylate and its application for dynamic structural coloration
abstract: We report vapor phase polymerization of the low bandgap conducting polymer poly(thieno[3,4- b ]thiophene):tosylate (pT34 b T:Tos) and explore its use for structural coloration, including UV patterned images and dynamic electrochemical tuning.

title: Single-atom effect on the regulation of the buried interface for self-assembled molecules in inverted perovskite solar cells
abstract: A series of self-assembled molecules featuring different chalcogen atoms was developed to be applied in perovskite solar cells which delivers a champion power conversion efficiency of 22.23% for POZ-PA based device along with good stability.

title: Simultaneous enhancement of magnetocaloric and magnetodielectric effects in MnCo 2 O 4 spinels by varying the Co/Mn ratio
abstract: Simultaneous enhancement of magnetocaloric and magnetodielectric effects in Mn 1.25 Co 1.75 O 4 spinels by varying the Co/Mn ratio.

title: Optoelectronic characteristics and stability evaluation of Ba 2 TiMxO 6 (Mx = Ge, Sn, Se, Te) p-type semiconductors as candidates for functional layers in optoelectronic devices
abstract: An investigation of novel Ba 2 TiMxO 6 (Mx = Ge, Sn, Se, Te), highlighting promising candidates for UV optoelectronics and solar cell applications.

title: Optical memory effect in a dynamic gadolinium–tetracyanidoplatinate coordination polymer for sensing deviations in temperature and humidity
abstract: Gd( iii )–Pt( ii ) coordination-metallophilic frameworks combine charge-transfer luminescence with water vapor sorption properties and reversible thermal dehydration. This results in optical tristability applicable for sensing temperature and humidity.

title: Role of liquid substrates in the self-assembly and charge transport of 2D organic semiconductors
abstract: Manipulating and comprehending the crystallization process of C8BTBT thin films formed at air–liquid interface for FET formation. The films are optimized to improve charge transfer property of the device and is also compared with spin coated method.

title: Unexpected piezoelectric properties of electrospun polyimide nanofibers for application in an extreme environment
abstract: The piezoelectric properties of FPI nanofibers were first discovered. This makes it a potential material for manufacturing wearable flexible electronic devices in extreme environments.

title: A review of the preparation and application of lead zirconate titanate (PZT) thin film sensors
abstract: This study systematically investigates the fabrication processes of lead zirconate titanate (PZT) thin-film sensors. It covers PZT synthesis methods ( e.g. , sol–gel, sputtering, pulsed laser deposition) and thin-film deposition techniques.

title: Lithium induced emission enhancement of Cr 3+ -activated fluoride with high thermal stability, toward night vision and information encryption applications
abstract: Broadband NIR phosphor K 2 Na 1− x Li x AlF 6 :Cr 3+ with excellent thermal quenching resistance was synthesized, to realize night vision and information encryption applications.

title: A self-powered bi-directional SnS 2 /SnSe heterostructure for an all-in-one optoelectronic logic device
abstract: A self-powered bi-directional SnS 2 /SnSe heterostructure for an all-in-one optoelectronic logic device.

title: 3D printing of self-powered piezoelectric sensors enabled gait recognition via deep learning
abstract: By leveraging 3D printing and deep learning, an intelligent system is built with a high accuracy of 98.7% for gait recognition. The deep learning-assisted sensor offers feasible solutions for health monitoring and disease diagnosis.

title: A co-solvent exfoliation strategy of quasi-1D electronic grade Ta 2 Pt 3 Se 8 for enhanced yields in non-toxic low boiling point solvents
abstract: A co-solvent exfoliation strategy using an IPA/water mixture significantly enhances the exfoliation efficiency of quasi-1D Ta 2 Pt 3 Se 8 nanowires, achieving high-yield production and excellent FET performance ( μ FE = 6.76 cm 2 V −1 s −1 , I on / I off > 10 3 ).

title: Shape customization of 2D materials using maskless ultrafast laser lithography
abstract: Herein, maskless ultrafast laser lithography was demonstrated for the shape customization of two-dimensional nanomaterials.

title: Improved infrared emissivity modulation of polyaniline based on various metal compound doping strategies
abstract: Polyaniline (PANI) has the potential to control infrared emissivity but suffers from insufficient modulation.

title: Memristive hysteresis and stacking-fault-induced semiconductor to metal transition in sulfur-modified multiwall carbon nanotubes
abstract: We investigate the current vs. voltage properties of sulfur-modified multiwall carbon nanotubes. We identify an interplay of semiconducting and metallic components, with memristive-responses. We highlight an important role of stacking-faults in triggering a local semiconducting to metal transition.

title: Towards room-temperature stable topological magnetic semiconductors based on two-dimensional Janus vanadium chalcogenides
abstract: A spintronic device based on a skyrmion transistor, designed to perform specific functions by encoding “0” and “1” using VXY Janus structures.

title: Nano-gapped Al/Al 2 O 3 nanorods: a novel paradigm for efficient SERS-based sensing in the deep UV region
abstract: A theoretical study that suggests potential benefits of hypothetical plasmonic nanoantennas based on nano-gapped Al nanorods for improved deep UV SERS-sensing performance, representing a novel and interesting paradigm for this kind of application.

title: Solution-processable triplet exciton harvesting blue and orange emitters for a high-efficiency, color-stable, simple-structured white fluorescent organic light-emitting diode
abstract: Solution-processable triplet exciton harvesting blue and orange fluorophores are synthesized and utilized as non-doped emitters in blue and orange OLEDs and a single-emitting-layer white OLED with decent device performances.

title: Structural, optoelectronic, magnetic, elastic, thermodynamic and thermoelectric properties of NaVSi half-Heusler alloys
abstract: Structural, electronic, magnetic, mechanical, optical, thermodynamic, and transport properties of half-Heusler alloys, this was achieved through density functional theory (DFT) calculations using the APW+lo method as implemented in the Wien2k code.

title: Dual doping strategy for enhancing the thermoelectric performance of Yb 0.4 Co 4 Sb 12
abstract: The strategy of co-doping has been appeared as an effective tool for phonon scattering via point defects.

title: Structural engineering of glass for regulating chemical surroundings of dopants
abstract: Here, to regulate the PL efficiency of dopants, we developed a novel method for regulating the chemical surroundings of dopants by modulating the network structure of the glass matrix, including composition and controlled nanocrystallization.

title: Correction: Circularly polarized luminescence with large dissymmetry factors based on perovskite and cholesteric liquid crystal polymer network films
abstract: Correction for ‘Circularly polarized luminescence with large dissymmetry factors based on perovskite and cholesteric liquid crystal polymer network films’ by Liting Xu et al. , J. Mater. Chem. C , 2025, 13 , 7544–7549, https://doi.org/10.1039/D4TC05268D.

title: A quantum anomalous Hall effect in novel two-dimensional structure Ta 2 Se 3
abstract: We report a 2D honeycomb-Kagome structure material with an intrinsic quantum anomalous Hall effect in the monolayer structure and an electric field-induced layer Hall effect in the bilayer structure.

title: Interfacial magnetic anisotropy of iron-adsorbed ferroelectric perovskites: first-principles and machine learning study
abstract: The advancement of spin-based devices as a replacement for CMOS technology demands lower spin-switching energy in ferromagnetic (FM) materials.

title: Experimental and DFT analysis of antisite disorder and Griffiths phase in Dy 2 CoMnO 6 : structural, electronic, and magnetic insights
abstract: Schematic of Dy 2 CoMnO 6 synthesis via solid-state route. CoO 6 /MnO 6 octahedra, vibrational modes, XRD-confirmed phase, and XPS showing mixed Co/Mn valence states are highlighted.

title: An oligomer-engineered active layer enables high-performance semi-transparent organic photovoltaics
abstract: A new oligomer XY-1 was introduced to construct a PTB7-Th-2F:2%XY-1:Y6-based ternary device. The optimized device exhibits a record power conversion efficiency of 14.49% in opaque and 12.00% in semi-transparent devices.

title: Flexible high-sensitivity magnetoelectric thin film composites of solution-derived BiFeO 3 –PbTiO 3 layers on Ni foils
abstract: This work demonstrates the high potential of flexible magnetoelectric materials for use in wearable sensors and energy harvesters.

title: Impact of dopant geometry on memristive properties of oriented layers of conjugated macromolecular nanowires
abstract: Memristive properties of oriented surface-grafted conjugated polymer brushes can be tuned by doping with simple inorganic salts of different spatial structure.

title: Two-step modification of high-performance inorganic perovskite quantum dots for blue light emission
abstract: CsPbBr 3 QDs were synthesized by a hot injection method, and high-performance blue-emitting TFA-DPE-CsPbBr 3 QDs were obtained by anion exchange using DPE, followed by passivation with CF3COO − and OLAH + .

title: A tuneable ionic memristor based on bipolar electrochemistry
abstract: A new mechanism—bipolar electrochemistry—is utilized to develop an ionic memristor with straightforward tuneability of its rectifying memristive current–potential response.

title: Self-powered MoTe 2 homojunction photodetector with ultrafast response via h-BN encapsulation and doping regulation
abstract: The TOC shows a schematic diagram of MoTe 2 homojunction photodetector; optical microscope image; photocurrent output characteristics under 637 nm laser illumination at different power levels; photocurrent mapping image.

title: Intelligent responsive polymeric hydrogels: unlocking a new code for precision medicine in clinical practice
abstract: Hydrogels with photomagnetic, photothermal, and pH-responsive properties can achieve precise drug delivery, sterilization, and wound healing, and change their structural properties in the unique pH environment of the lesion site.

title: High-temperature atomic layer deposition of HfO 2 film with low impurity using a novel Hf precursor
abstract: HfO 2 film was grown using a novel Hf precursor, FuHf(NMe 2 ) 3 . Physicochemical and electrical properties were improved at high temperature compared to film grown using the CpHf(NMe 2 ) 3 precursor, and it was verified by theoretical calculations.

title: Design and fabrication of elastic bilayer fabrics with dual functions: superior asymmetric liquid management and real-time wearable monitoring
abstract: The combination of comfort and monitoring in safety protective equipment is crucial for long-term wear and standardizing movement behavior.

title: Structure–property coupling in lead-free halides Rb 3 Sb 2 Br 9 and Rb 3 Sb 2 Br 6 I 3 obtained by mechanochemistry
